name: job-application-agent
description: A local-first job application automation platform with resume parsing, job search aggregation, scoring, approval queue, and guarded Playwright automation.

scripts.lint: node --check server/index.js && node --check server/db.js && node --check server/services/resumeParser.js && node --check server/services/matchingEngine.js && node --check server/services/jobSearch.js && node --check server/services/applicationAutomation.js
